results.title: The picture is much better than the product.
results.reviewText: I was disappointed with this product. The material is so thin and therefore, the product feels cheap. I wore it to a spinning class and it stuck to me, was not breathable and quickly stained from my sweat marks. Saddened by the decrease in quality of this brand which I used to adore.

luluResponse.responseText: We’re sorry the Sculpt Tank Top didn’t deliver the quality and performance you were expecting. We understand how frustrating it is when a longtime favorite brand doesn’t meet your expectations, and we’ll be sure to share your feedback with our Product team.

results.title: Too long
results.reviewText: Did the style of this top change? I have one similar with a cutout in the back. I don’t like this new style it’s a little long. Wish Lululemon wouldn’t keep changing styles. Makes it hard to be a repeat customer. I bought this for my half marathon and returned it. Bring back the old style with the mesh and the cutout in the back that was a little shorter.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing—your feedback on the updated length and the absence of features like the mesh and back cutout helps highlight what made the previous design so loved. Honest thoughts help shape future styles and updates.

results.title: Soccer mom
results.reviewText: Not what I expected but can’t return 🫣

luluResponse.responseText: We hear this style didn't land as expected— for Essential Members, final sale purchases can be returned in-store for store credit or an exchange. You can also connect with our Guest Education Centre through Live Chat or by calling 1.877.263.9300 if you’d like a online hand with next steps.

results.title: Too Long
results.reviewText: It is really long and fits weird

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for letting us know that the Sculpt Tank Top could further improve with a shorter length and better fit. Your feedback helps us to evolve and further improve our gear.

results.title: Cheap.
results.reviewText: So thin & cheap. I’ve found older versions of this tank in goodwill that are so much thicker & better quality. I don’t know when lululemon will realize that their quality has gone drastically downhill over the years. How much worse can it get??? 95% of the items i try to order (that i loved in the past) are SO cheap and not worth the price. Leaving reviews seems pointless if they will never listen.

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for letting us know that the Sculpt Tank Top has room left to grow. Your feedback helps us to evolve and further improve our gear.

results.title: Item was not dispatched and no explanation

luluResponse.responseText: We hear you're still waiting on this shirt. If the order is outside delivery timelines please reach out online via the Contact Us page for support—we're always here to assist with any order concerns.

results.title: Not like last years sculpt
results.reviewText: So disappointed - this no longer has the little pleats in the back that gave it a loose and flattering fit.  Please bring back the one that was pleasantly different than anything else out there.

luluResponse.responseText: Your feedback on the design of this style is meaningful to us. We always welcome honest thoughts, as it shows us where we can make future improvements.

results.title: It came with a stain
results.reviewText: It cam me with a stain that its been impossible to removed.

results.title: Not the Sculpt Tank we know and love.
results.reviewText: Fabric and styling just off. This re-imagined sculpt tank is made with a different fabric than the old sculpt. It feels too light, thin and clings to the body - like static. The seams are not surged and the neck is tighter/higher than the old sculpt.  Nice red colour.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for walking through your experience with the updated Sculpt Tank Top. Notes on the fabric feel, seams, and neckline compared to the previous version are helpful as we continue refining this design.

results.title: Not a fab
results.reviewText: This top looks like a dress - it’s ridiculously long! Whatever happened to the shorter, more cropped version of this tank? Everyone LOVED it…. Bring it back

luluResponse.responseText: Please know we have various styles and fits available in the Sculpt collection. For support with exploring the current styles available you can connect online with our Product Experts via the Contact Us page. To be the first to know when a specific style makes a return, you can sign up for updates on the Email Sign Up page.

results.title: Not worth the  price
results.reviewText: Too thin to be useful - took it back

results.title: Why change a good thing?
results.reviewText: The sculpt was the best running tank and crop. That was until they changed the neckline and material. Please bring back old version with pleat. I wear a 6 in bra and 4 in this. 5’3”, 120lb. 34C.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your connection to the original style and how this version is showing up differently for you. We’re always refining the details that shape how our gear feels, fits, and performs, and insights like yours help us move in the right direction.

results.title: Stains all over shirt
results.reviewText: Ordered online and shirt was delivered with stains all over it. Very disappointing. I returned. I hoped to reorder, but it was sold out. Expected better quality for a $58 shirt.

luluResponse.responseText: We see you were able to connect with the Guest Education Centre (GEC) on this. If further support is still needed, reach out to us at gec@lululemon.com so we can continue helping out.

results.title: Poor Quality
results.reviewText: The quality of the material was low. Poor quality.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your thoughts. If you're open to continuing the conversation in more detail, connect with us through our 'Contact Us' page. We'd be happy to support.

results.title: Careful w tops!
results.reviewText: This is my first time being a lulu too and will definitely be my last.  My top had snags all over after washing as instructed and Lulu didn’t honor their quality promise when I reached out to them.

luluResponse.responseText: We understand the fabric snagged on your Sculpt Tank Top and appreciate this feedback. Please keep in mind that we handle Quality Promise returns on a case-by-case basis for each item, proof of purchase or identification is required, and items impacted by ordinary wear and tear, misuse, accidents or change of personal preference aren't eligible for return. For more details, please refer to the email sent by our Quality Returns team or visit our Quality Promise page.

results.title: Does not look blue to me
results.reviewText: I received the tank top and shorts and they did not look blue at all. They looked purple. I contacted the company and let them know because I thought they would match my running shoes that are light blue that I bought for Lululemon very disappointed.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback on the Serene Blue colour of your Sculpt Tank Top. We hear your feedback about the colour looking more purple and not matching the colour that was expected, and we want to ensure there are no discrepancies when shopping our gear online. We can see you've been in touch with our support team at the GEC. Please feel free to reach back out if there's anything else we can lend a hand with, or if you decide you want support with a return.
